prompt: Create a dramatic vertical cinematic action poster in a 9:16 crop: a fierce female post-apocalyptic warrior named unnamed cactus warrior stands in the middle of a ruined modern city, low-angle perspective, dust storm and shattered buildings behind her. She wears a tight black leather armored bodice with a deep neckline, black tactical pants, belts, pouches, straps, dark metal shoulder and arm armor, and tattered yellow cloth panels hanging from her waist. Her wet dark brown hair whips in the wind, but her face is intentionally hidden by one small opaque brown rectangular censor block centered over her head. She thrusts a massive spiked metal mace toward the camera, creating extreme foreground perspective: the mace head is huge, blurred slightly by depth of field, covered in gold spikes, dark worn metal, scratches, and an embossed cactus-like emblem on the front. Behind her rises one enormous prickly pear cactus paddle, towering diagonally from lower right to upper left like a monstrous shield, yellow-green and scarred, with many long white thorns and red cactus fruit buds; debris and sparks fly through the air. In the upper right background, include one giant ghostly close-up female head or hair silhouette partially visible behind the cactus, with its face covered by one large opaque brown rectangular censor block. Use exactly 2 censor rectangles total: 1 small block over the warrior’s face and 1 large block over the background face. The mood is explosive, gritty, hyper-detailed, dark fantasy sci-fi, photorealistic concept art, high contrast golden-hour backlight, volumetric smoke, falling rubble, dynamic motion, shallow depth of field, no text, no watermark.
